---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for quantum-dev-env
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🤔 Problem / Use Case

What problem does this feature solve? Why do you need it?

Example: *"I find it frustrating when [...] because [...]"*

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📋 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.

## 🏷️ Category

Which area does this feature relate to?

- [ ] New platform support (macOS, Fedora, etc.)
- [ ] New quantum framework (Amazon Braket, Azure Quantum, etc.)
- [ ] Installer improvements
- [ ] New example programs
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] VS Code integration
- [ ] Shell configuration
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Other

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I checked the [contributing guide](../../docs/contributing.md)
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this feature
